# jamfschool_move_device_to_trash (Action)

Moves a device to trash (soft delete).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Move a device to trash.
action "jamfschool_move_device_to_trash" "decommission" {
  config {
    serial_number = "C02ABC123DEF"
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `serial_number` (String) Device serial number. Provide this or `udid`.
- `udid` (String) Device UDID. Provide this or `serial_number`.
